changes.summary: Added backend-ranked recommended food items endpoint for user home feed.
Handoff updates now enforce proof for delivered/failed states and may validate geofence alignment.
Added vendor handoff status update endpoint for class delivery workflows.
Added campus buildings and delivery zones endpoints for delivery-to-class flows.
Added class session CRUD endpoints for user schedules.
Order create now supports delivery-to-class metadata and handoff fields.
Order list payloads now include delivery-to-class fields.
Vendor order queue now includes scheduled fulfillment and promo discount fields.
User order list now returns promo and scheduling fields.
Order create now accepts promo_code and scheduled_for and returns discount fields.
Added promo validation and admin promo management endpoints.
Added notification feed, read, and device token registration endpoints.
Added scheduled order slot discovery endpoint.
Aligned search contract response to menu item list with embedded vendor info.
Added customer order cancellation endpoint for pending/accepted orders.
Added CSV export endpoint for admin payout reporting.

RBAC parity hardening now scopes customer mutations (orders, addresses, payments, reviews) to user-role tokens only, requires vendor/admin role for delivery location updates, and rejects non-vendor sessions during vendor_app restore/login.

Sensitive admin actions (block user, reject vendor, cancel order) now require an explicit reason that is recorded in the audit log. Audit log response includes new reason field. Three new endpoint contracts registered: admin.user.block, admin.vendor.reject, admin.order.cancel.
Auth middleware now enforces blocked/banned account denial with 403 and supports request-trace observability headers for admin consumers.
Vendor order queue now includes pacing metadata (elapsed/target/recommended prep minutes plus sla_risk and pace_label).
Order create response now includes ETA confidence envelope (eta.min_minutes/max_minutes/confidence).
User order listing now includes ETA confidence envelope for trust-surface rendering in clients.
Standardized pagination metadata (meta.page/limit/total/totalPages/hasNextPage/hasPreviousPage) in admin list responses.
Added pending vendors paginated response contract metadata.
Introduced retry/backoff, request-cancellation, and contracts-feed caching rollout flags for app consumers.
Added contracts feature-flags endpoint for staged rollout control.
Added changelog feed endpoint for consumer-side compatibility checks.
Standardized error taxonomy mapping across 400/401/403/404/409/500 envelopes.

flags.description: Enforces blocked/banned account denial at auth middleware and propagates request-trace metadata for admin observability.
Enforces dedicated role scopes for customer mutations, vendor operational updates, and vendor_app session restoration/login flows.
Requires admin operators to provide an explicit reason for sensitive actions (block user, reject vendor, cancel order) before they are executed and recorded in the audit log.
Enables pacing metadata on vendor order queue responses for prep-time assist and SLA risk surfaces.
Enables ETA confidence envelope on order create/list responses for checkout and tracking trust surfaces.
Enables bounded retry with incremental backoff for retryable API failures in app consumers.
Enables in-flight request cancellation and GET dedupe for superseded client requests.
Enables short-lived contracts feed caching for registry/changelog/flags reads.
Enables expanded endpoint coverage in contracts registry feed.
Enforces standardized error taxonomy envelope in API responses.
Allows consumers to execute strict DTO assertions using registry metadata.
